ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart configuration */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query used in the chart */,
  "x_axis" TEXT /* Column to use for the x-axis of the chart */,
  "y_axis" TEXT /* Column(s) to use for the y-axis of the chart */,
  "sort_order" TEXT /* Whether to apply default sort to the data */,
  "series_column" TEXT /* Column to use as the series (groups) in a multi-series chart */,
  "chart_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart type (e.g., line, bar, scatter) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the chart */,
  "x_axis_label" TEXT /* Label for the x-axis */,
  "y_axis_label" TEXT /* Label for the y-axis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_chart_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_type_id") REFERENCES chart_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "query_name" TEXT /* Query name wrapped in curly braces */,
  "query_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart type (e.g., line, bar, scatter) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the chart type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart-series relationship */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the series belongs to */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "series_color" TEXT /* Color of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_series_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart data entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the data belongs to */,
  "data_json" TEXT /* Chart data in JSON format */,
  "data_csv" TEXT /* Chart data in CSV format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_data_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart image */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the chart image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., PNG, JPEG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_images_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_charts" (
  "user_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-chart relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the chart */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the user created */,
  "favorite" INTEGER /* Whether the chart is a favorite of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_charts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_charts_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the feedback is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the chart (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_feedback_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the comment is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_comments_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart being shared */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* User or group the chart is being shared with */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart was shared */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the shared chart (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_sharing_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart tag */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the tag is for */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_color" TEXT /* Color of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_tags_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart category */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the category is for */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_categories_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart being exported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the chart */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of export (e.g., PNG, CSV) */,
  "exported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart was exported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_exports_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart being bookmarked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who bookmarked the chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart was bookmarked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_bookmarks_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
